title: Autonomy policy doc exists and defines all five levels
description: docs/design-docs/autonomy.md is the human-agent contract about what agents can do without approval. If this case fails, someone deleted or gutted the policy — no autonomous merges should happen until it's restored. Checks for Level 0 through Level 4 headings, plus the deny-list and demotion-triggers sections.
command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='docs/design-docs/autonomy.md'; if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('missing '+p); process.exit(1);} const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); const required=['Level 0','Level 1','Level 2','Level 3','Level 4','Deny list','Promotion criteria','Demotion triggers']; const missing=required.filter(r=>!c.includes(r)); if(missing.length){console.error('autonomy.md missing sections: '+missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('ok');"
